reviews.review_title: Read this if gold spooky terror not work
reviews.review_description: So everyone I've been looking at the gold spooky terror reviews. And some people been saying I got right back from school, and I want to play Gold spooky terror, and it was not working. If you wanna fix it, follow these steps. First, try to restart your V. R. Second, try to update the game. And last install the game and check if it works. Try all those 3 steps, and it should work now. And if you add these things for reading i wish I couldn't play Gold spooky terror  bye

So i got banned within a couple days from this review but i got falsely banned for escaping the map even though i got punched straight into the plasma and was launched to space and maybe only 1 mod will know me which is Gilbert I am speed if you remember me please unban me i love this game and don't got dc

reviews.review_title: MY REVIEW OF GOLDS SPOOKY TERROR.
reviews.review_description:
I’m so sorry for people who didn’t get to experience golds spooky terror, currently it is on shutdown and the game needs a rest, due to the apk modders destroying gst.

Somehow the game will come back but no one knows when or how.

But before it shutdown, it was peak I enjoyed this game since august - December.

Golds your game always made me smile and have a bit of scaryness inside of me
But thank you for also adding my fanart before you shutdown.

Thank you
I will always see you as the next “CLOUDS GORILLA HORROR” in my heart.

See you soon, GST
Welcome, Applesauce.
